title: Vantage AI
description: AI job preparation. Upload your CV, paste a job link, get the full prep pack in ~90 seconds.

items.title: Just laid off in April 2026? The 3 things to fix in your CV before you apply to a single job.
items.summary: ~42,000 tech employees were laid off in April 2026 alone. If you're one of them, this is the foundation work to do before you start applying.

items.title: Oracle, Meta, ASML, Snap, Nike: a layoff-week CV checklist
items.summary: A specific 5-step checklist for tech employees laid off in April/May 2026.

items.title: Tailoring every resume vs the smarter alternative
items.summary: Why fully tailoring every resume might be costing you interviews — and the smarter system used by people who apply at scale.

items.title: 500 applications, zero interviews: the ATS parse problem nobody talks about
items.summary: Why hundreds of applications can return zero replies — and a 60-second test that diagnoses it.

items.title: How to spot a ghost job in 30 seconds
items.summary: Half the postings out there are not real jobs. Here's the 30-second check that decides if you should apply — or skip and save the hour.
